rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 4/10 with the same three strengths and substantively identical concerns (lack of Java experience, basic German). The wording differs slightly ('experience in Java' vs 'experience with Java', 'No direct experience in the insurance sector' reframed as 'Not directly matching the required qualifications'), but these are reworded restatements of the same job-relevant gaps, well within ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Sarah Smith.
